docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,560.00 FILED BY MILLER, DONELL AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAMES DEVARD--RETAINED CLAIMS REP. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DONNEL MILLER--RETAINED CLAIMS REP. ASKED THE COURT TO MAIL A COPY OF THE JUDGMENT TO HIM. HE IS NOT A NAMED DEFENDANT IN THIS CASE. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, DONELL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, DONELL AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JAN-12-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, DONELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
